verdict.rationale: The operations review reports Q4 2025 net revenue retention of 106.0% on a trailing 12-month cohort basis, matching the claim's time scope, but the claim asserts 108.0% — a 2 percentage-point discrepancy with no corroborating 108% figure in the customer appendix.
verdict.suggested_action: Reconcile the 108.0% in the master document against the 106.0% in the operations review; confirm which source is authoritative before publishing.
